title: Savory Malaysian Frankfurter Stir-fry
description: A savory and dense brunch-mood Malaysian dish featuring crispy frankfurters stir-fried with Mediterranean-friendly vegetables, spices, and sauces.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (such as coriander leaves or parsley)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and bell peppers, sauté until translucent and slightly softened.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Place frankfurters on top of the vegetables. Add salt, pepper, tomato paste, and molasses (or Hainan black soy sauce). Stir to combine evenly with the veggies and frankfurters.
Pour in vegetable broth or water and bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Cover and cook for about 10-15 minutes until the liquid is absorbed and the frankfurters are fully cooked. Toss occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Serve hot with fresh herbs on top as garnish.
